Nicktoons.uk.title: Wylde Pak
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Jack gets his first phone and mistakes are immediately made in 'Wrong Text', then in 'Emergency Family Tribunal', when the last hallasand goes missing, fingers point to Halmoni.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Wylde Pak
Nicktoons.uk.desc: LAD has a sleepover and Jack makes a promise in 'J-LAD', then in 'Big Honey', when Will's parents visit Canyon Valley, news of the sale of their bee farm sends the family into a spiral.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Tales of the Ninja Turtles
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Leo becomes the superhero Night Ninja, taking on... a florist and some dognappers.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Sonic Prime
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Sonic and the crew of the Angel's Voyage aren't the only ones after the No Place Shard. The Chaos Council co-opted Nine's Shatterdrive tech and want it back too.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Sonic Prime
Nicktoons.uk.desc: In The Void, Shadow intercepts Sonic's latest Shatterspace transverse, for a personal face-to-fist encounter.

Nicktoons.uk.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Dave, Simon and Theodore are worried for Alvin's safety in 'The Karate Kidder', then in 'Playing Favourites', Alvin and Theo challenge Simon to a go-cart race.

Nicktoons.uk.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Simon moves into a tree for some alone time in 'Back To Basics', then in 'Report Cards', Alvin worries about his bad report card and does everything to catch the mail before Dave sees it.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Boog and Elliot grow tired of Ian in 'What the Chinook', then in 'Everybody Loves Ian', Boog feels sorry that Ian hasn't received any love tokens.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Weenie's 'collecting' becomes an issue in 'Weenie's Trailer Trash', then in 'Close Encounters of the Nutty Kind', The Camp is gripped by alien paranoia and fear.
